scene.setting: a dimly lit, narrow wooden bridge inside a stone building, possibly a castle.

objects.name: wooden bridge
objects.description: a narrow, old wooden bridge with a dark, worn surface.

key_actions: A hand reaches up from a dark, shadowy area beneath the bridge floor.
visual_objective.visibility_notes: The scene is very dark, with the main light source illuminating the bridge floor and the group in the background.

audio_description: The sound of a heavy object dragging across a hard surface, followed by a brief, high-pitched electronic tone.
